identity.name: Celebrity Buzz Index
identity.archetype: Electric & Neon mixed with Jewel & Luxury

scale.h1: text-6xl md:text-8xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none
scale.caption: text-xs md:text-sm font-mono tracking-widest uppercase text-muted-foreground

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 rounded-none font-bold uppercase tracking-widest transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(255,255,255,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 h-12 px-8 rounded-none font-bold uppercase tracking-widest transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-primary-foreground h-12 px-8 rounded-none font-bold uppercase tracking-widest transition-all

cards.base: bg-card border border-border rounded-none overflow-hidden relative group hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.base: bg-input border-transparent focus:border-primary rounded-none h-12 px-4 text-lg transition-all focus:ring-0 focus:shadow-[0_0_0_2px_rgba(255,0,153,0.3)]

badges.base: rounded-none px-2 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest

visual_enhancers.textures: bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] opacity-20 mix-blend-overlay pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Use 'Anton' font for all headings. It is the signature look.
CRITICAL: Do not use rounded corners. Use 'rounded-none' for a sharp, brutalist magazine feel.
CRITICAL: Implement the 'Ticker' component at the top of the dashboard for breaking news.
CRITICAL: Use the 'Electric Pink' (#FF0099) for the primary call-to-action and buzz score highlights.
CRITICAL: Ensure the background is NOT pure black, but #050505 to allow shadows to be visible.
CRITICAL: Use the provided image URLs for category backgrounds and hero sections.
CRITICAL: Add a noise texture overlay to the entire app for a 'print magazine' feel.
CRITICAL: All interactive elements must have a hover state that changes color or scale.
CRITICAL: Use 'Space Grotesk' for all numbers, stats, and data displays.
CRITICAL: The 'Buzz Score' should be a prominent, animated number.
CRITICAL: Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications.
CRITICAL: Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
